creator: shiba@mxs.meshnet.or.jp
text:
Xfree86 odd behavier (colors) on CPU_686

K6 ,P55C is no effect

Fix: 

need to fix 'pmap_setdevram' or 'vga_probe'
I modified pmap.c.(always return on top in pmap_setdevram.)
How-To-Repeat: vga_probe(pcisupport.c) calls pmap_setdevram .exist bug at point(probably).
